address.street: CARLINGFORD ROAD (R173), DUNDALK, COUNTY LOUTH, IRELAND.

properties.DETAILS_PAGE_DESCRIPTION:
We are excited to introduce two brand-new panoramic padel courts at Ballymascanlon Hotel & Golf Resort, offering a premium playing experience in a stunning resort setting.
Our courts feature high-quality artificial turf, professional glass walls, and lighting for evening play. Players can enjoy free parking, access to changing facilities, and on-site dining within the resort.
Suitable for all levels, from beginners to experienced players, we aim to create a welcoming padel community with social games, coaching, and future events.

Welcome to Banner Padel - Clare's first dedicated indoor padel club.
Featuring 6 premium Super panoramic Greenset courts, Banner Padel offers an exceptional indoor playing experience in the heart of Ennis.
Whether you're taking your first lesson, joining a social event, competing in leagues, or simply enjoying a game with friends, our club is built for every level of player.
Why play at Banner Padel?
• 6 indoor Super panoramic Greenset courts
• Coaching for all abilities
• Socials, leagues & tournaments
• Equipment rental available
• Coffee & refreshments
• Free parking
Discover why padel is the world's fastest-growing sport. We look forward to welcoming you to Banner Padel.

properties.DETAILS_PAGE_DESCRIPTION:
Welcome to Borrisoleigh Padel 100!! 
Team will be on hand between 5pm-10pm weekdays and 9am-10pm on weekends. 
Rent padels and buy balls/coffee/snacks etc...  
Available to book directly through the Playtomic app.

Experience padel at its finest with our panoramic padel courts, designed to deliver a premium playing experience. Featuring full-height, pillar-free glass at the back of the court.
Built to professional standards, these courts combine high-quality tempered glass, precision-engineered steel structures, and premium artificial turf to ensure exceptional performance, durability, and safety. 
Perfect for clubs, tournaments, and social play. Come, compete, and enjoy the game at The Castle Oaks House Hotel Padel Courts.

tenant_name: **NOW also opening Mon-Wed 5pm to 10pm** The Pavilion Padel Club at Castle Durrow

properties.DETAILS_PAGE_DESCRIPTION:
Located on the estate of Castle Durrow Country House, The Pavilion Padel Club is surrounded by rolling parklands, tucked among mature woodland and framed by historic walled gardens and the gentle flow of the River Erkina.

Top-tier courts in a setting steeped in old-world Irish heritage. A relaxed clubhouse with an understated, members-club feel. Confident, social and quietly refined.

After your game, step into the castle for a cocktail by the fire or dinner at Coopers Restaurant. Padel, followed by something timeless.

properties.DETAILS_PAGE_DESCRIPTION:
Welcome to Connemara Sands Padel Club. We are located just outside Clifden, Connemara in the heart of the Wild Atlantic Way and central to Slyne Head Peninsula special area of conservation. We have 2 brand new outdoor padel courts available to use by both hotel guests and non hotel guests.
The courts are manufactured by Jubo Padel and they are the Infinity Extreme hurricane proof version. Special attention has been paid to court drainage and the robustness of the manufacturing and installation process. The courts have full panoramic glass, door access control and bespoke LED lighting for winter play.
Handball ( & Racquetball )

House of Padel – Irelands Premier Indoor Padel Club

Welcome to House of Padel, Ireland’s number one indoor padel facility — a premium destination designed for players of all levels.
The venue features four world-class indoor courts, ensuring perfect playing conditions all year round.

Beyond the game, enjoy our modern café, serving specialty coffee, açaí bowls, smoothies, and fresh sandwiches — the ideal post-match spot to relax or socialise. We also offer equipment rental, pro coaching, and social events throughout the week.

At House of Padel, we’re more than just a club — we’re a community built around energy, fun, and quality experiences on and off the court.

Three Outdoor Panoramic Padel Courts in a beautiful setting in the River Valley Resort in Redcross, Co. Wicklow. Open to residents and non-residents.
Just 50 minutes drive from Dublin, 30 minutes from Greystones, 25 minutes from Gorey and 15 minutes from Wicklow and Arklow.
Spoil yourself afterwards for lunch or dinner in the adjacent award winning Mickey Finn's Pub and Restaurant.
Thinking about a Padel weekend away, why not book some luxury Lodges or Glamping in River Valley Holiday Park. www.rivervalleypark.ie.
Private Padel Lessons can be organised with Andres Martines (0034) 695 071133
When Reception is closed, please call into Mickey Finn's Pub (located on-site) for Padel rental and ball purchase.  Mickey Finn's is open from 12.30 Wed - Sunday.

The Rosslare Community & Sports Centre is at the centre of the vibrant village of Rosslare, with a host of activities on offer all year round. The Centre offers a wide range of onsite facilities including 2 Padel, 2 Tiger Turf & 1 Hard Court,  Playground, 18 hole Crazy Golf course, Bowls, Running Track, Basketball, All Weather Pitch, Football Pitch, Indoor hall, and spaces for a variety of fitness classes. We can also provide venues for meetings and training events, backed up by a comprehensive administrative service to include scanning, photocopying, correspondence etc.

properties.DETAILS_PAGE_DESCRIPTION: Get ready, Carlow & Laois — something truly exciting is arriving this **Friday, 10th October****!** Looking for padel courts in the Midlands or Southeast? Talbot Padel Club will be home to both counties’ very first padel courts, located on the grounds of **Talbot Hotel Carlow**. Whether you’re a seasoned athlete or trying something new, padel is the game everyone is talking about.

We offer 4 clay tennis courts, and 2 padel courts in the beautiful village of Termonfeckin, minutes from the town of Drogheda and very accessible to North Leinser and North Dublin via Drogheda Town Bypass. Padel court fees are offered at a reduced rate to Tennis Club members. See https://www.termonfeckintennisclub.ie. for more information, or find us on Facebook and Intsagram.
Note: We do not rent padel rackets or balls.

South Padel is open at The K Club with two flood lit covered courts, suitable for play in all weather. 
Located on the South side of the resort, next to South Bar & Restaurant, as well as our two tennis courts and K Golf World, our indoor golf simulators.

**Padel is arriving in Wicklow Town.**
Get ready to experience the fastest-growing sport in the world, right here on your doorstep. Whether you’re new to the game or already hooked, W7 Padel will be the perfect place to play, compete, and connect.
**Court Pricing**
**Off-Peak: €30 per hour (€7.50pp)**
**Peak: €45 per hour (€11.25pp)**
**90 minutes peak (discounted): €60 (€15pp)**
To celebrate our launch, we’re offering** Exclusive Early Bird Discount Packages — t**he best way to guarantee your court time, save money, and be among the very first to play on Wicklow’s new padel courts.** These discounts are available for a limited time only.**
